title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models; drop-in LLM and embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; markdown, code highlighting, model manager.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich-terminal CLI for chatting with Ollama models; history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; upload PDFs and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for Ollama with one-line run commands.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, Spring Boot starter included.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module wrapping the Ollama JS client; providers for chat & embeddings.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and streaming chat support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI commands inside your vault.
